title: Brazilian Creamy Stir Fry
description: A nostalgic twist on a classic Brazilian dish, this creamy stir fry is a flavorful and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and bell peppers and cook until tender.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cooked Brazilian sausage and stir to combine.
Add stir fry sauce and cook for 2 minutes.
Add halved tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices.
Stir in heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
